ddls:
CREATE TABLE "councils" (
  "council_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each council */,
  "council_name" TEXT /* Name of the council */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the council area */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Geographic area of the council in square kilometers */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the council */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the council */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the council */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the council's official website */,
  "elected_officials" TEXT /* Names and contact information of key elected officials */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the council record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the council record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("council_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_action_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate action plan */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the council associated with the plan */,
  "has_plan" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the council has a climate action plan */,
  "carbon_neutral_target" INTEGER /* Target year for achieving carbon neutrality (NULL if no target) */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the climate action plan */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Date the climate action plan was initiated */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the plan */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the climate action plan */,
  "key_initiatives" TEXT /* List of key initiatives and projects included in the plan */,
  "progress_report" TEXT /* Summary of the current progress towards the goals */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the plan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the plan record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_action_plans_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_action_plans_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_declarations" (
  "declaration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency declaration */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the council associated with the declaration */,
  "declared_emergency" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the council has declared a climate emergency */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date of the emergency declaration (NULL if not declared) */,
  "declaration_statement" TEXT /* Full text of the emergency declaration */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the emergency declaration */,
  "response_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken following the declaration */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the declaration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the declaration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the declaration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("declaration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_declarations_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_declarations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "council_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity score */,
  "council_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first council in the comparison */,
  "council_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second council in the comparison */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two councils (0-100%) */,
  "reason_for_similarity" TEXT /* Brief explanation of why the councils are similar */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the similarity score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the similarity score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the similarity score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_council_similarity_council_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("council_id_2") REFERENCES councils ("council_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_council_similarity_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_council_similarity_council_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("council_id_1") REFERENCES councils ("council_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* ID of the council accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id")
)
